Button.description: Clickable button with variants, sizes, and optional icon. No default slot — use the `text` prop for the label and `iconName` for icons.

props.text: Button label text (required for a visible label)
props.isFull: Stretch to full width of parent container
props.iconName: Icon from the design system icon library (use search_icons to find names)
props.iconPosition: Icon placement relative to the text label
props.onlyIcon: Circular icon-only button — hides text, requires iconName
props.groupPosition: Used internally by GroupedButtons — do not set manually

Card.description: Content container with optional padding, shadow elevation, hover/focus/pressed states, and optional link behavior via `href` prop.

props.href: Renders the card as an <a> tag with this URL
props.hovered: v-model:hovered — two-way binding for hover state
props.focused: v-model:focused — two-way binding for focus state
props.pressed: v-model:pressed — two-way binding for pressed state
props.maxWidth: Maximum width (string with unit or number in px)
props.flexDirection: CSS flex-direction for the card content

Checkbox.description: Checkbox input with two modes: simple (default slot for label) or card mode (`title`/`description` props for a bordered card layout).

props.color: Color of the checked icon (ThemeColor value)
props.checkboxPosition: Checkbox placement relative to label content
props.title: Card mode: main label text (enables card layout)
props.description: Card mode: secondary description text below title
props.fullWidth: Stretch to full width of parent container

slots.default: Label content — used in simple mode (when `title` prop is not set)

Accordion.description: Expandable/collapsible content section with animated height transition. Use `expanded` prop or listen to `toggle-expand` event to control state.

props.label: Header text (used when the `label` slot is not provided)
props.bordered: Show a border around the accordion

events.toggle-expand: Fired when the header is clicked — toggle your `expanded` state in this handler

slots.default: Collapsible body content — scoped: { expanded: boolean }
slots.label: Custom header/trigger content — scoped: { expanded: boolean }

TextInput.description: Text input field with label, validation states (success/warning/error), prefix/suffix icons, clearable button, and optional character counter.

props.label: Visible label text above the input
props.errorMessage: Error message — shown when validationState is 'error'
props.prefixIcon: Icon shown inside the input on the left
props.suffixIcon: Icon shown inside the input on the right
props.clearable: Show a clear (X) button when input has a value
props.showCounter: Show character counter — requires maxLength to be set
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label for screen readers (when no visible label)
props.ariaDescribedBy: ID of an element that describes this input
props.showValidationIcon: Show an icon indicating the validation state

events.enter: Fired on Enter key press with the current input value

Select.description: Single-selection dropdown with optional search filtering. Options must be `{ value, label }` objects. Use v-model for the selected value.

props.options: Array of { value: string|number, label: string, disabled?: boolean }
props.modelValue: v-model binding — the selected value (string | number | null)
props.searchQuery: v-model:searchQuery — two-way binding for the search input
props.searchable: Show a search input inside the dropdown
props.disableAutofilter: Disable client-side filtering — use for server-side search with v-model:searchQuery
props.errorMessage: Error message shown below the select
props.helperText: Helper text shown below the select
props.appendToBody: Teleport dropdown to <body> — use when inside overflow:hidden containers

events.select: Fired with the full option object { value, label } when an option is selected

Multiselect.description: Multi-selection dropdown with checkboxes and optional search. Options must be `{ value, label }` objects. v-model is an array of selected values.

props.options: Array of { value: string|number, label: string, disabled?: boolean }
props.modelValue: v-model binding — array of selected values
props.searchQuery: v-model:searchQuery — two-way binding for the search input
props.maxSelections: Maximum number of items that can be selected
props.maxSelectionsMessage: Message shown when max selections is reached
props.showSelectedItems: Show selected items as tags below the dropdown
props.errorMessage: Error message shown below the multiselect
props.helperText: Helper text shown below the multiselect
props.appendToBody: Teleport dropdown to <body> — use when inside overflow:hidden containers

events.option-select: Fired with the full option object when an item is checked
events.option-deselect: Fired with the full option object when an item is unchecked
events.remove-tag: Fired with the value when a selected tag is removed
events.clear: Fired when all selections are cleared

Tab.description: Tab navigation with pill-style buttons. Use v-model:selectedTab for the active tab and the default scoped slot for tab panel content.

props.tabs: Array of { value: string|number, label: string, disabled?: boolean, icon?: IconNames }
props.selectedTab: v-model:selectedTab — the currently active tab value

events.tab-click: Fired when a tab is clicked — payload: { value, label }

slots.default: Tab panel content — scoped: { currentTab: TabItem, currentValue: string|number }

GroupedButtons.description: Segmented control — horizontal group of mutually exclusive toggle buttons. Use v-model:selectedButton for the active option.

props.options: Array of { value: string|number, label: string, disabled?: boolean, icon?: IconNames }
props.selectedButton: v-model:selectedButton — the currently active button value
props.fullWidth: Stretch buttons to fill the container width equally

DropdownButton.description: Button that opens a dropdown menu with selectable items. Use the `select` event to handle item selection.

props.menuItems: Array of { value: string|number, label: string, icon?: IconNames, disabled?: boolean }

events.select: Fired with the full menu item object when an item is selected
events.open: Fired when the dropdown menu opens
events.close: Fired when the dropdown menu closes

Table.description: Data table with client-side sorting. Use `cell-{key}` scoped slots for custom cell rendering. No built-in row-click — add interactions via cell slots.

props.columns: Array of { key: string, label: string, sortable?: boolean, sortType?: 'text'|'number'|'date' }
props.data: Array of row objects — each row is keyed by column.key
props.striped: Alternate row background colors for readability
props.defaultSortColumn: Column key to sort by on initial render
props.nonInteractive: Disable hover/click styles and sorting — for display-only tables

slots.cell-{key}: Custom cell renderer per column. Scoped: { row, column, value }. Example: <template #cell-name="{ row }">{{ row.name }}</template>

Radio.description: Radio button input with label and optional description text. Use `card` prop for a bordered card-style layout.

props.title: Radio label text (required)
props.description: Secondary description text below the label

Tooltip.description: Tooltip shown on hover/focus around its slotted trigger element. Supports four positions and configurable show delay.

props.delay: Delay in milliseconds before showing the tooltip
props.maxWidth: Maximum width in pixels for the tooltip bubble

slots.default: The trigger element the tooltip is attached to

Icon.description: SVG icon from the design system icon library (127 icons). Always verify icon names exist using the search_icons tool before using.

props.name: Icon name in kebab-case (e.g. 'close-outline', 'check-outline'). Use search_icons tool to find valid names.
props.color: Icon color — accepts any ThemeColor value

Spinner.description: Animated loading spinner with gradient effect. Use inside buttons (loading prop) or as standalone loading indicators.

SkeletonPreload.description: Skeleton loading placeholder with animated shimmer effect. Use to indicate content loading — matches the shape of the content it replaces.

props.borderRadius: Border radius in pixels (for rounded rectangles)
props.isRounded: Perfect circle shape — for avatar or profile image placeholders

ImagePreview.description: Image component with built-in loading skeleton and error fallback. Shows a skeleton placeholder while loading and a fallback on error.

DropZone.description: Drag-and-drop file upload area with preview. Events are prefixed with `instanceName` (e.g. instanceName='avatar' emits @avatar-drop, @avatar-drop-error, @avatar-remove).

props.instanceName: Unique ID (required) — used as event prefix: {instanceName}-drop, {instanceName}-drop-error, {instanceName}-remove
props.label: Custom label text for the drop area
props.displayPreview: Show image preview thumbnails for uploaded files
props.displayFileList: Show a file list instead of previews

manualEvents.name: {instanceName}-drop-error
manualEvents.description: Error message when a file is rejected (wrong type, etc.)

manualEvents.name: {instanceName}-remove
manualEvents.description: A file was removed from the preview

manualEvents.name: update:modelValue
manualEvents.description: Model value updated with current file list

Overlay.description: Modal backdrop overlay with scroll lock and keyboard support. Place your modal content in the default slot. Use v-model:visible to control visibility.

props.visible: v-model:visible — controls whether the overlay is shown
props.dismissible: Allow closing via backdrop click or Escape key
props.closeOnBackdrop: Close when clicking outside the modal content
props.lockScroll: Prevent background scroll while overlay is open
props.blur: Apply a blur effect to the backdrop
props.placement: Vertical placement of the modal content
props.ariaLabel: Accessible label for the overlay dialog

events.escape: Fired when the Escape key is pressed
events.backdrop-click: Fired when the backdrop area is clicked (not the content)

slots.default: Modal content — rendered on top of the backdrop

OverlayMessage.description: Pre-built modal dialog for status messages (success, error, warning, info). Includes title, body content, and up to two action buttons. Wraps Overlay internally.

props.title: Dialog title text (required)
props.status: Status type — determines the default icon and color
props.eyebrow: Small text displayed above the title
props.visible: v-model:visible — controls whether the dialog is shown
props.primaryButtonLabel: Label for the primary action button
props.secondaryButtonLabel: Label for the secondary action button
props.primaryButtonVariant: Visual variant for the primary button (e.g. 'primary', 'secondary')
props.secondaryButtonVariant: Visual variant for the secondary button
props.loadingPrimary: Show spinner on the primary button
props.loadingSecondary: Show spinner on the secondary button
props.standalone: Render without Overlay wrapper — use for embedding inside existing modals

events.primary-click: Fired when the primary action button is clicked
events.secondary-click: Fired when the secondary action button is clicked
events.backdrop-click: Fired when the backdrop area is clicked
events.escape: Fired when the Escape key is pressed

slots.default: Message body content — rendered between the title and action buttons
slots.icon: Custom icon replacing the default status icon
slots.actions: Custom action buttons replacing the default primary/secondary buttons

LogoToteat.description: Toteat brand logo. Supports 'complete' (full logo with text) or 'icon' (isotipo) mode, with 'original', 'cream-orange', or 'black-cream' color variants.

BackgroundWrapper.description: Full-screen background wrapper with the Toteat brand gradient. No configurable props — just wrap your content in the default slot.

slots.default: Content rendered on top of the gradient background

TreeItem.description: Individual tree node — used internally by TreeList. Prefer TreeList for most use cases. TreeItem handles a single node's expand/collapse, selection, and drag behavior.

props.item: Tree node data: { id, label, children?, disabled?, meta? }
props.level: Nesting depth — controls indentation (0 = root level)
props.selectable: Show a checkbox for this node
props.flatIndex: 0-indexed position in the flattened tree — used for striped rows
props.parentId: ID of the parent node (null for root)
props.bordered: Show a border around the node
props.striped: Alternate background color based on flatIndex

events.toggle-expand: Fired with the item ID when expanded/collapsed
events.toggle-select: Fired with the item ID when checkbox is toggled

slots.prefix: Content before the label — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.label: Custom label content — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.meta: Custom meta text (right side) — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.suffix: Content after the label — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }

TreeList.description: Hierarchical tree list with expand/collapse, checkbox selection, and optional drag-to-reorder within the same level. Use v-model:expandedIds and v-model:selectedIds to control state.

props.items: Hierarchical tree data — array of TreeItemData with nested children
props.draggable: Enable drag-and-drop reordering within the same parent level
props.expandedIds: v-model:expandedIds — array of expanded node IDs
props.selectedIds: v-model:selectedIds — array of selected (checked) node IDs

events.reorder: Fired after drag-and-drop — payload: { itemId, fromParentId, toParentId, fromIndex, toIndex }
events.item-expand: Fired with full TreeItemData when a node is expanded/collapsed
events.item-select: Fired with full TreeItemData when a node's checkbox is toggled

slots.label: Custom label per node — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.meta: Custom meta text per node — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.prefix: Content before each node's label — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
slots.suffix: Content after each node's label — scoped: { item: TreeItemData, level: number }
